requirement.title: Add NotebookLM RAG integration — per-agent learning (Phase 1 + Phase 2)
requirement.description: Add five per-agent Google NotebookLM notebooks as an advisory RAG layer. Query before agent dispatch; sync after run. Phase 1: scripts/rag_*.py + rag/config.py + rag/corpus/. Phase 2: cto-iterate.md Step 4 + Step 7 updates.

architect.summary: Full implementation plan with 3 ADRs (ADR-005/006/007), exact file content specs for all 7 files, sync call moved to Step 7 (not Step 6) because JSONL is written in Step 7. Alt B (TypeScript in agent/) and Alt C (monolithic rag.py) rejected.

security.summary: BLOCKED with 10 remediations (R1-R10). 3 P0 issues: data exfiltration (memory files to Google), persistent prompt injection via RAG loop, audit-log breach. All incorporated into Developer brief. New patterns appended to lessons.md.

developer.summary: 13 files created/edited. All 10 security remediations applied. requirements.txt, rag/config.py, rag/corpus/lessons-summary.md, rag/corpus/decisions-summary.md, scripts/rag_setup.py, scripts/rag_query.py, scripts/rag_sync.py, scripts/rag_rebuild.py, scripts/test_rag.py created. .gitignore, cto-iterate.md, settings.json edited.

findings: JSONL_ALLOWLIST constant in rag_sync.py is dead code (non-blocking)
decision/outcome regex preserves hyphens (only exploitable with runs/ write access — non-blocking)
qa.summary: PASS 88/100. 10/10 unit tests pass. All 10 remediations verified. Corpus files clean (no PII, no internal service names, no Vault paths). cto-iterate.md Step 4 and Step 7 verified correct.

autonomy_check.reason: 13 files exceeds <=5 threshold; new external dependency
